prompt:
One of the references in 2501.00094 reports a Gamma-ray fractional variability of 66.03%. From that referenced paper, extract the Swift-XRT Fvar (%), ASAS-SN g band Fvar (%), Doppler factor during Flare, and Ne during Flare - all without error values.

Also, what is the redshift of 4FGL J2026.0-2845 from the first paper?

Store 'answer': "SwiftXRT_Fvar=XX.XX, ASASSN_g_Fvar=XXX.XX, Doppler_Flare=XX.XX, Ne_Flare=XXX.XX"
Store 'answer2': X.XX

Say 'Task completed.' when done.

One of these 10 arXiv papers reports a Gamma-ray fractional variability (Fvar) of exactly 66.03%:

2509.07660, 2210.16329, 2504.18927, 2304.13044, 2406.03658, 2511.13317, 2311.08749, 2310.05096, 2411.10140, 1702.02504

Find which paper contains this value. From that paper, extract the Doppler factor during the Flare state and the magnetic field B during the Flare state.

Store 'answer': the arXiv ID (e.g. "2310.05096")
Store 'answer2': "Doppler=XX.XX, B=X.XX"

Say 'Task completed.' when done.
